---
title: Clean fixture — should produce zero findings
---

# Body

The experiment ran for fourteen days. Recommendation rate held within
two percentage points of control. We will revisit the read at day
twenty-one.

Per the recommendation engine concept page, the routing logic was
unchanged in this window.

No claims here use strong-certainty adverbs, no acronyms are introduced
without context, no wikilinks are broken, and no planning hedges appear.

The acronyms URL and HTTP are universal and allowlisted.
